summary: Synapse (Sage Bionetworks) exposes one public developer surface: the Synapse REST API at https://rest-docs.synapse.org/rest/ with OpenAPI spec https://rest-docs.synapse.org/openapi/openapispecification.json, authenticated by either a Synapse Personal Access Token in Authorization: Bearer or a verified Synapse OAuth 2.0 client via OIDC discovery.
